fixture_needed.missing_fixture: PTZ preflight found zero telemetry/PTZ access points and zero control panels on the demo stand. Add only when a non-production PTZ fixture is present and approved.

gRPC PullEvents receives detector events. WebSocket /events returns HTTP 101 but closes immediately across URL Basic auth, explicit Basic header, schema/no-schema, origin variants, camera include, detector include, and device track. Resolve Web server WebSocket behavior or test through a Web server fixture with active /events streaming.
Focused preflight checked 127.0.0.1:8888 and <demo-host>:8888; both refused connections. Add only when an Axxon Client HTTP API target is available.
fixture_needed.pdf_area: Client HTTP API for layouts and videowalls

fixture_needed.missing_fixture: PTZ preflight confirms no control panels; fixture discovery also found no water-level devices. Add examples only after a configured control-panel or water-level device exists.
fixture_needed.pdf_area: gRPC control panels and water level

fixture_needed.missing_fixture: Tag&Track tracker reads require a telemetry/PTZ access point; none is configured. Add only after a Tag&Track fixture and safe PTZ read plan are present.

SecurityService exposes EnableGoogleAuth/DisableGoogleAuth (proto SecurityService.proto:1000-1002) and EEnableTFAResult/EDisableTFAResult enums. No live TFA mutation evidence on demo stand. Requires a Google Authenticator/OTP fixture and an isolated test user before live enable/disable can be exercised with rollback.
